hits.title: Ask HN: Why is Kubernetes so frustrating to set up?
hits.story_text: I've been trying to deploy a simple app on Kubernetes for two weeks. The documentation is terrible and I'm tired of fighting YAML files. Has anyone found a better alternative to k8s?

hits.title: Show HN: I built a Kubernetes dashboard
hits.story_text: After being frustrated with existing tools, I built my own dashboard.

hits.title: Kubernetes is overpriced for small teams
hits.story_text: The cost of running k8s on any cloud provider is too expensive for a startup. We switched from EKS after the bill hit $3000/month for a simple app.

itemDetail.title: Ask HN: Why is Kubernetes so frustrating to set up?
itemDetail.text: I've been trying to deploy a simple app on Kubernetes for two weeks.

children.text: Same here. I wasted weeks on this. The documentation is awful and confusing.
I switched to Nomad and never looked back. Worth paying for the simplicity.
Have you tried k3s? It's a lightweight alternative that works great for small teams.
